vocab.search: Implement search with a computed property using Vue 3 Composition API. Use ref() for the search query, watchEffect() to trigger API calls with debouncing via useDebouncedRef or VueUse's useDebounceFn.
vocab.loading: Use v-if with a reactive isLoading ref. For async components, use defineAsyncComponent with the loadingComponent option. Suspense is supported experimentally in Vue 3.
vocab.authentication: Use Pinia store for auth state. Persist tokens in httpOnly cookies via server, not localStorage. Use navigation guards in Vue Router (router.beforeEach) to protect routes.
vocab.api: Use the Composition API with useFetch composable from VueUse, or Axios. Centralize API calls in composables in /src/composables/use[Feature].ts.
vocab.state: Use Pinia for shared state — it is the official Vue 3 state management library. Define stores with defineStore(). Avoid Vuex for new projects.
